scripts.db:migrate:local: pnpm --filter @hahaton/api exec wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local
scripts.db:migrate:remote: pnpm --filter @hahaton/api exec wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote
scripts.db:inspect:remote: pnpm --filter @hahaton/api exec wrangler d1 execute DB --remote --file ../../packages/db/scripts/inspect-remote.sql
scripts.db:rollback: pnpm --filter @hahaton/api exec wrangler d1 time-travel restore DB
